hero.sub: Post a job. Verified Calgary businesses quote it. Book with escrow-protected payments — released in two stages, half on confirmation and half when the work is done.
hero.floatQuoteSub: Quote sent 3 min ago · Ready to book

categories.title: Whatever the job — someone local can quote it.

howItWorks.title: Same platform, two flows.
howItWorks.clientTitle: Post it. Compare it. Book it.

1.title: Post a job
1.desc: Category, address, budget, photos. Two minutes.

2.title: Get quotes
2.desc: Verified Calgary businesses tap Express interest with a price.

3.title: Book + pay safely
3.desc: Pay through escrow. First 50% releases on confirmation.

4.title: Done → release + review
4.desc: Confirm complete. Remaining 50% releases. Leave a review.

1.title: Sign up + verify
1.desc: Manual verification in 24–48 hours during the Calgary beta.

2.title: Browse nearby
2.desc: Real jobs sorted by distance and recency. No mystery leads.

3.title: Quote + win
3.desc: Tap a post, add your price and pitch. Chat opens on the quote; booking unlocks the full address.

4.title: Complete + paid
4.desc: You keep 90% after the 10% commission. No subscription, no per-quote fee.

escrow.title: Your money moves in two steps, not one.
escrow.body: SwingBy splits every payment — half releases to the business when you confirm the booking so they can schedule the work, half when you approve the finish. If something goes wrong, we can withhold the unreleased balance until the dispute is resolved.

trust.title: Four things we hold ourselves to.

verified.title: Verified businesses
verified.desc: Manual license + identity check before any business can quote.

reviews.title: Honest reviews
reviews.desc: Only confirmed bookings can leave one. Businesses can't suppress them.

canadian.title: Canadian-owned
canadian.desc: Built in Calgary. Data in Canadian regions. Real local support.

support.title: Real human support
support.desc: 72-hour dispute review. We can withhold the unreleased balance until resolved.

calgary.title: Built local, before going national.
calgary.body: We're proving the model in Calgary first. Every business is checked by a real human. Every quote is from someone who can actually do the job in your neighbourhood.

app.title: Calgary jobs, one tap away.
app.body: Native iOS and Android. Browse nearby posts, quote without leaving the feed, message safely on any job you've quoted on.
app.storeNote: App store listings open at general launch.

free.a: Yes. Posting jobs and receiving quotes is free. You pay the agreed price to the business — nothing more. The 10% commission comes out of the business's payout, not on top of your bill.

verify.a: A SwingBy team member reviews each license and identity manually during the Calgary beta. Automated checks come post-beta once we know the edge cases to catch.

payment.a: Payment is held in escrow when you book. 50% is released on booking confirmation. The remaining 50% releases when you confirm the job is done — minus our 10% fee.

unhappy.q: What if I'm not happy with the work?
unhappy.a: Open a dispute through the app. SwingBy support reviews within 72 hours and can withhold any balance not yet released until it's resolved.

cities.a: Live in Calgary today. Other cities open once we have enough verified businesses to quote there — no fake city pages.

finalCta.title: Ready to get it done?
finalCta.sub: Post a job in two minutes. Free for clients — always.

footer.tagline: The trust layer for local services.
